title: Self-Care Products - Canada.ca
content:
How self-care products, including natural health products, cosmetics and non-prescription drugs, are regulated in Canada.

## Services and information

### Path forward for Natural and Non-prescription health products
Health Canada's path forward for regulating natural and non-prescription health products.

### Regulation of non-prescription drugs
How non-prescription drugs are currently regulated.

### Regulation of cosmetics products
How cosmetics are currently regulated.

### Regulation of natural health products
How natural health products are regulated.

### Non-prescription Drug Action Plan
Health Canada's first step in simplifying market access for non-prescription drugs.
